description_long: This house features a tall, narrow main structure with a steeply pitched red-tiled roof and a lower, elongated wing extending to one side. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige stucco with exposed red brick accents at the corners and around the windows, giving it a rustic, old-European appearance. Windows are small and rectangular, with blue-tinted panes, and are arranged asymmetrically across the facade. The main entrance is set into the taller section, with a simple door and a few barrels and crates placed nearby, suggesting a lived-in, urban environment. The roofline is varied, with both gable and shed elements, and a prominent chimney rises from the shorter wing. The house sits on a cobblestone base, further enhancing its historic, urban character.
description: A tall, narrow house with a red-tiled roof, beige stucco walls, and red brick accents, featuring asymmetrical windows and a cobblestone base.
description_view_0: The narrow end of the house is visible, showing the main entrance, several small windows, and barrels on the cobblestone ground.
description_view_1: The long side of the house is shown, highlighting the extended wing, multiple windows, and the prominent red-tiled roof and chimney.
description_view_2: The rear narrow side is visible, featuring a small window, a sloped roof extension, and some crates and barrels on the cobblestone.
description_view_3: The opposite long side is shown, displaying the tall main structure, the lower wing, and a mix of windows and brickwork.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple door set into the main facade, no porch, with barrels and crates nearby on cobblestone
